enableAgricultureHelp: Solar radiation, CAPE, soil temperature, irradiance under *.agriculture
enableComfortHelp: Heat index, wind chill, humidex, UV index under *.comfort
hourlyDaysExceedsDaysCount: Must not exceed number of forecast days
hourlyDaysHelp: For how many days hourly values should be stored (must be ≤ number of days)
iconPreviewWmo: Preview: WMO icons (OGC WorldWeatherSymbols, CC BY 4.0)
iconSetHelp: Which icon set to use for the icon_url datapoint
warnFrostThresholdHelp: Send warning when temperature drops below this value
hourlyDaysHighWarning: Each hourly day generates many datapoints depending on enabled options
